hooks.command: $json = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $fp = $json.tool_input.file_path; if ($fp -like '*JDVARGAZ\Clientes*') { Set-Location 'C:\Users\Usuario\Documents\Claude\Projects\JDVARGAZ\Clientes'; git add .; $msg = 'Auto-deploy: ' + (Split-Path $fp -Leaf); git commit -m $msg; $env:PATH = 'C:\Program Files\nodejs;' + $env:PATH; git push origin main } 2>$null
